summaryAm: ትንሿ ቀይ ኮፍያ ወደ አያቷ ቤት ስትሄድ መንገድ መከተል፣ መስማት እና ከታመኑ አዋቂዎች እርዳታ መጠየቅን የምትማርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: የተነገረንን መንገድ መከተል እና እርዳታ መጠየቅ ደህንነትን ይጠብቃል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This adaptation removes frightening violence and keeps the safety lesson gentle.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ቀይ ኮፍያ ለአያቷ ትኩስ እንጀራ እና ፍራፍሬ ይዛ ተነሳች። እናቷ “ቀጥታ በመንገዱ ሂጂ” አለቻት።
pages.textEn: Little Red Cap carried bread and fruit to her grandmother.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little Red Cap with a basket of bread and fruit leaving home in morning light.

pages.textAm: በመንገድ ላይ አበቦች ቆንጆ ነበሩ። እሷ ግን መጀመሪያ አያቷን ማየት እንዳለባት አስታወሰች።
pages.textEn: The flowers were beautiful, but she remembered to stay on the path.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little Red Cap walking on a safe forest path beside colorful flowers.

pages.textAm: ትንሽ ተኩላ ከዛፍ ጀርባ ተመለከተ። “ወዴት ትሄጃለሽ?” ብሎ ጠየቀ። ቀይ ኮፍያም በጥንቃቄ እና በአጭር መልስ ተናገረች።
pages.textEn: A small wolf asked where she was going, and she answered carefully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A small non-scary wolf speaking from behind a tree while Little Red Cap stays on the path.

pages.textAm: ቀይ ኮፍያ የጫካ ጠባቂን አገኘች። “እባክዎ ወደ አያቴ ቤት መንገዱን ያሳዩኝ” አለች።
pages.textEn: Little Red Cap met a forest keeper and asked for help finding the way.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A friendly forest keeper showing Little Red Cap the safe path to grandmother's cottage.

pages.textAm: አያቷ ቤት ሲደርሱ ትንሹ ተኩላ ከቤቱ ውጭ ተቀምጦ ነበር። ጠባቂው በቀስታ “ይህ የሰዎች ቤት ነው፤ ወደ ጫካህ ተመለስ” አለው።
pages.textEn: At grandmother's house, the keeper gently guided the wolf back to the forest.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A forest keeper kindly guiding a small wolf away from grandmother's cozy cottage.

pages.textAm: ቀይ ኮፍያ ከአያቷ ጋር ተቀምጣ እንጀራውን አጋራች። ቅርጫቷንም አጠገቧ አስቀመጠች፣ ልቧም ተረጋጋ።
pages.textEn: Little Red Cap shared bread with grandmother, set her basket nearby, and felt calm.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little Red Cap and grandmother sharing bread in a warm cottage kitchen.

pages.textAm: አያቷ ቀይ ኮፍያን በቀስታ አቀፈቻት። “መንገድን መከተልሽ እና እርዳታ መጠየቅሽ ጥሩ ነበር” አለች።
pages.textEn: Grandmother praised Little Red Cap for staying on the path and asking for help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Little girl in a red hood sitting safely with grandmother in a cozy cottage.

pages.textAm: ቀይ ኮፍያ የቀረውን እንጀራ በቅርጫት አዘጋጀች። ለጫካ ጠባቂውም “እኛን ስለረዱን እናመሰግናለን” ብላ ትንሽ ፍሬ ሰጠችው።
pages.textEn: She thanked the forest keeper with bread and fruit.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Red-hooded child giving fruit to a kind forest keeper near grandmother cottage.

pages.textAm: በመመለሻ መንገድ ጠባቂው የዛፎችን ምልክት አሳያት። “ይህ ቀጥታ መንገድ ነው፣ ይህ ደግሞ ወደ ወንዝ ይወስዳል” አለ።
pages.textEn: On the way back, the forest keeper showed her safe path markers.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Kind forest keeper showing a red-hooded child tree markers on a sunny path.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ ተኩላ ከሩቅ ተመለከተ። በዚህ ጊዜ ቀይ ኮፍያ ርቀትዋን ጠበቀች፣ በጨዋነት እጇን አወዛወዘች፣ መንገዷንም ቀጠለች።
pages.textEn: When the little wolf watched from far away, she kept a safe distance and continued on.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Red-hooded child waving politely from a safe distance on a forest path.

pages.textAm: ቤት ስትደርስ ለእናቷ ሁሉንም ነገረች። እናቷም “ደግ መሆን እና ጥንቃቄ መያዝ አብረው ይሄዳሉ” አለች። ቀይ ኮፍያም የመንገድ ምልክቶችን ማስታወስ ተማረች።
pages.textEn: At home, she learned that kindness and caution can go together.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Red-hooded child safely home with mother, basket on table, warm evening.
